SEARCH

Uses of Interface
com.nib.commons.storage.IntegerVariable

Packages that use IntegerVariable
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.jms.api
Supernaut JMS API
com.nib.supernaut.values
Value objects and constants for Supernaut.

  • Uses of IntegerVariable in com.nib.commons.storage

    Classes in com.nib.commons.storage that implement IntegerVariable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractNDecimal
    AbstractNDecimal is an abstract class designed to handle numeric values with a specified number of significant digits and adjustable decimal precision.
    class 
    NInt16
    Represents a signed 16-bit integer (2-byte) data type.
    class 
    NInt32
    Represents a 32-bit signed integer within the numeric data types hierarchy.
    class 
    NInt64
    The NInt64 class represents a 64-bit signed integer data type.
    class 
    NInteger
    The NInteger class provides an implementation for handling numeric integer variables.
    class 
    NPacked
    The NPacked class represents a packed decimal data type typically used in memory-based numerical operations.
    class 
    NPointer
    Persistent pointer to a memory location.
    class 
    NUInt16
    The NUInt16 class represents an unsigned 16-bit integer.
    class 
    NUInt32
    The NUInt32 class represents a 32-bit unsigned integer in a specific data area structure.
    class 
    NZoned
    Represents a numeric, zoned-decimal formatted field with support for variable length, decimal places, and optional signed values.

    Methods in com.nib.supernaut with parameters of type IntegerVariable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.abend(String abcode, boolean cancel, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Issues an ABEND command with the specified abend code.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressCommarea(AbstractNField ca, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the COMMAREA and sets the address of the provided field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressCwa(AbstractNField field, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the CWA (Common Work Area) and sets the address of the provided field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressCwa(NPointer ptr, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the CWA (Common Work Area) and sets the pointer to its address.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.addressTwa(AbstractNField twaField, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Addresses the TWA (Task Work Area) and sets the address of the provided field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.askTime(IntegerVariable abstime, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Asks for the current time and sets the absolute time variable.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignAbcode(AbstractNField abcode, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the abend code to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignApplid(AbstractNField applid, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the application identifier (APPLID) to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignChannel(AbstractNField channel, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the current channel name to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignCwaleng(IntegerVariable cwalength, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the length of the Common Work Area (CWA) to the specified variable.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignFacility(AbstractNField sc, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the name of the facility that initated task to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignNetname(AbstractNField netname, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the terminal NETNAME to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignOpclass(AbstractNField opclass, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the OPCLASS (Operator Class) to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignOpid(AbstractNField opid, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the OPID (Operator ID) to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignStartCode(AbstractNField sc, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the task start code to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignSysid(AbstractNField sysid, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the system identifier (SYSID) to the specified field.
    CommandResponse

    Assigns the length of the Transaction Work Area (TWA) to the specified variable.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignUserid(AbstractNField userid, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the user ID to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.assignUsername(AbstractNField username, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Assigns the username to the specified field.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.attachMain(NPointer ptr, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Attaches a pointer to previously allocated GETMAIN shared storage.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.bifDeedit(AbstractNField field, int length, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Executes a BIF DEEDIT command to process a field by removing non-numeric characters and applying zoned sign encoding if necessary.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.commit(boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Commits the current transaction and releases resources.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.delayInterval(Interval timeInterval, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Pause execution for a specified time.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.deleteFile(String sysid, String file, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Deletes a file record using the specified system ID and file name.
    CommandResponse

    Deletes a file record using the RIDFLD (Record Identifier Field).
    CommandResponse

    CommandResponse

    Deletes the specified temporary storage queue.
    CommandResponse

    Deletes the specified transient data queue.
    CommandResponse

    Dequeues a resource for the current task or unit of work.
    CommandResponse

    Creates a document with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.documentDelete(String doctoken, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)

    CommandResponse

    CommandResponse

    Sets symbols or symbol lists in a document with the specified parameters.
    CommandResponse

    Dumps debug information of current transaction with the specified dump code and data.

    SupernautContext.endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, boolean handleAid, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2)
    Handles the end of CICS command execution by processing the command response, updating EIB fields, handling conditions and errors, and determining the appropriate action based on procedural logic or exception handling.
    protected CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2)
    Finalizes the execution of a command and returns the resulting response.
